violations.text: Menu lacks allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The hand-washing sinks in the kitchen and bathroom were lacking proper handwashing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Chicken and mac & cheese, which was previously cooked and cooled, were only reheated between 53-109 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food that is cooked, cooled, and reheated for hot holding must be reheated to 165 degrees Fahrenheit or above for 15 seconds. PIC discarded. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Fried chicken was observed held at between 45-47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC discarded items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2026

Various items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The establishment is lacking a thermometer to test food temperatures. Food temperature measuring devices shall be provided and be readily accessible for checking cooking, cooling, reheating, and hot/cold holding temperatures of time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The doors to the outside, located at the front entrance AND garage bay door, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026

The presence of rodents are not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the single service storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

Inspector observed knives stored in-between wall and 3 bay sink. Utensils must be stored in a clean/sanitary manner. PIC removed to wash/sanitize. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
Single service items were observed stored on the floor. Items must be stored at least 6 inches off the ground. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The following non-food contact surfaces have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: - prep unit - freezer unit - 2 door cooler - prep table shelves - toaster oven New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/06/2026
The ceiling in the kitchen area is in poor repair (missing tile). The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/20/2026
The 3 bay sink is lacking a faucet head. New Violation. Correct By: 10/20/2023
